word: H1686 - דִּבְיֹון - dibyôwn - dib-yone' - Dove's dung

sections.paragraph:
Original: חריון דּביון

Transliteration: dibyôn cheryôn

Phonetic: dib-yone'

BDB Definition:

  1. doves dung

Origin: both (in the pl. only and) of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: ?

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
